_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 mutation resulted in increased phosphorylation and activation of ERK, while having no effect on total ERK protein expression
details: Successfully detected total ERK protein expression with no difference between Nf1+/- and control mice by Western blot
